'''Perilious''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was home to a large criminal element, which including a large [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] ring that dealt in [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]. The world was continually covered by storms.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Vydel Dir'Nul]], tracked a serial killer, called [[Vydel Dir'Nul|Kardem]], to Perilious.
